generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance RaspberryPiAirQualitySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi equipped with environmental sensors (CO2, particulate matter, temperature, humidity) for real-time air quality monitoring in indoor spaces. Data is transmitted via AutomationML-based interfaces."
    DTDFVocab:producedData AirQualitySensorDataTransmitted
]

instance GreenhouseEnvironmentalSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental sensors (temperature, humidity, light) integrated with GreenhouseDT system for greenhouse monitoring. Data stored in InfluxDB for time-series analysis."
    DTDFVocab:producedData GreenhouseEnvironmentalDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneEncoderSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "AS5600 angular encoder for measuring joint angles of the gantry crane trolley and hoist with high precision. Data sampled at ≥1kHz for real-time trajectory validation."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneKinematicDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneLoadCellSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "HX711 load cell for measuring payload weight and distribution on the gantry crane. Used for adaptive control and fault detection in real-time."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneLoadDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance AirQualitySensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom RaspberryPiAirQualitySensor
    base:desc "Real-time environmental data (CO2, PM2.5, temperature, humidity) transmitted from Raspberry Pi sensors to digital twin via AutomationML interfaces. High-resolution sampling for virus spread simulations."
]

instance GreenhouseEnvironmentalDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GreenhouseEnvironmentalSensor
    base:desc "Time-series environmental data (temperature, humidity, light) from greenhouse sensors transmitted to InfluxDB for behavioral adaptation model synchronization."
]

instance CraneKinematicDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneEncoderSensor
    base:desc "High-frequency kinematic data (joint angles, velocities) from crane encoders transmitted via ROS topics or UDP streams to TimescaleDB for real-time validation."
]

instance CraneLoadDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneLoadCellSensor
    base:desc "Payload measurement data from load cells transmitted alongside kinematic data for adaptive control and fault detection in the gantry crane system."
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance AutomationMLAirQualityModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "AutomationML-based digital twin model representing indoor air quality dynamics including geometric layouts and behavioral models for airflow and virus spread simulations."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MicrosoftAzurePipelineEnabler, AutomationMLInterfaceEnabler
]

instance GreenhouseBehavioralAdaptationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Behavioral adaptation model for greenhouse systems enabling dynamic adjustments in real-time through sensor-actuator feedback loops. Preconfigured with prerecorded data for offline training."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo InfluxDBTimeSeriesEnabler, ActiveMQMessageBrokerEnabler
]

instance GantryCraneKinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Symbolic kinematic model of the gantry crane including forward/inverse kinematics for trolley and hoist motion, implemented using MATLAB Symbolic Toolbox or PyRobot."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROSKinematicPublisherEnabler, GazeboSimulationEnabler
]

instance GantryCraneControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model-Predictive Control (MPC) and PID tuning models for real-time trajectory optimization and adaptive control of the gantry crane under kinematic constraints."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROSControlEnabler, MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance AirQualitySimulationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Historical and real-time air quality simulation data including sensor measurements, airflow dynamics, and virus spread predictions stored in queryable format."
    DTDFVocab:fromData AirQualitySensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MicrosoftAzureAnalyticsEnabler, AutomationMLInterfaceEnabler
]

instance GreenhouseTimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data from greenhouse environmental sensors and behavioral adaptation models stored in InfluxDB for synchronization and offline model training."
    DTDFVocab:fromData GreenhouseEnvironmentalDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo InfluxDBTimeSeriesEnabler, ActiveMQMessageBrokerEnabler
]

instance CraneRealTimeTrajectoryData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time trajectory data including executed paths, kinematic states, and control signals from the gantry crane stored in TimescaleDB for continuous validation."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneKinematicDataTransmitted, CraneLoadDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler, ROSControlEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance MicrosoftAzurePipelineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Microsoft Azure tools for pipeline orchestration including runtime visualization, simulation, and predictive analytics for air quality management."
    DTDFVocab:enables AirQualityRuntimeVisualizationService, AirQualitySimulationService, AirQualityPredictionService
]

instance InfluxDBTimeSeriesEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "InfluxDB time-series database for storing and querying environmental data from greenhouse sensors and behavioral adaptation models."
    DTDFVocab:enables GreenhouseDataLoggingService, GreenhouseModelSynchronizationService
]

instance ActiveMQMessageBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ActiveMQ message broker facilitating model-data synchronization between physical greenhouse and its digital twin counterpart."
    DTDFVocab:enables GreenhouseBehavioralAdaptationService, GreenhouseOfflineTrainingService
]

instance ROSKinematicPublisherEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS robot_state_publisher for publishing kinematic states of the gantry crane to the digital twin for real-time synchronization."
    DTDFVocab:enables CraneStateEstimationService, CraneTrajectoryOptimizationService
]

instance GazeboSimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Gazebo/Ignition Gazebo simulation engine for physics-based simulation of the gantry crane with real-time factor for hardware-in-the-loop testing."
    DTDFVocab:enables CraneSimulationService, CraneFaultDetectionService
]

instance ROSControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS Control framework for real-time PID and MPC implementation on the gantry crane with device-agnostic actuator control."

]

instance MATLABSimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [

]

instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB database for storing structured logs of physical twin states and digital twin predictions with low-latency querying."
    DTDFVocab:enables CraneHistoricalDataLoggingService, CraneContinuousValidationService
]

instance AutomationMLInterfaceEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "AutomationML-based interfaces for structured representation of geometric and behavioral models in air quality management systems."

]

]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control flows from the **Digital Twin** to the **Physical Crane** are mediated by the **Control Application**, which uses the **Physical Crane Interface** to send commands to the crane’s controllers. Command types include trajectory setpoints generated by the **Trajectory Generator Service**, which ensures optimal movement without residual swinging. Control message formats are not explicitly specified but are likely structured as kinematic trajectories (e.g., waypoints, velocity profiles) or low-level control signals (e.g., joint torques). Validation and authentication mechanisms are not described, but the **Continuous Validation Service** implicitly enforces correctness by comparing executed trajectories to simulations. Feedback systems are bidirectional: the **Logging Application** captures physical execution data, while the **Dashboard** provides real-time visualization for operators. Conflict resolution is not addressed, but the **MQTT Broker** facilitates signaling between services, potentially enabling priority-based command routing. Command execution confirmation is implied via the validation service’s comparison of simulated vs. executed trajectories, with alerts triggered for deviations."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin systems employ an **ad-hoc, lightweight orchestration** approach, avoiding commercial frameworks. The **GreenhouseDT** uses **InfluxDB** (time-series database) and **ActiveMQ** (message broker) for **event-driven coordination** between physical (greenhouse) and digital components, while the **Air Quality Management** exemplar integrates **AutomationML** for model-driven twin engineering and **Microsoft Azure tools** for pipeline orchestration. The **gantry crane** system (logistics domain) follows a **C4 Model**-based architecture, emphasizing **containerization** (e.g., Docker-like virtualization) for dissemination but lacks explicit system-wide coordination protocols. All exemplars prioritize **modularity** and **interoperability** via **single-board computers (Raspberry Pi)** and **virtualization/containerization**, with no centralized management layer documented."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The **GreenhouseDT** system emphasizes **self-adaptive behavioral fidelity**, where both the physical greenhouse and its digital twin dynamically adjust based on real-time data and predefined adaptation rules. Validation is implicitly supported by **prerecorded data** in virtual machine images, enabling offline testing of model accuracy. The **Air Quality Management** exemplar focuses on **model-driven validation** via AutomationML, ensuring geometric and behavioral models align with physical constraints. Uncertainty quantification is not explicitly addressed, but the use of **Microsoft Azure tools** suggests integration with cloud-based analytics for error detection (e.g., anomaly detection in sensor data). Quality assurance processes are ad-hoc, relying on **runtime visualization** and **predictive simulations** to cross-validate model outputs against physical observations. No formal verification methods (e.g., formal proofs, statistical testing) or error correction protocols are documented."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The **Digital Twin**’s technical network infrastructure relies on a **TimescaleDB** database for centralized data storage, accessed by services via unspecified protocols (likely SQL or HTTP APIs). The **MQTT Broker** enables lightweight, event-driven communication between services (e.g., **Trajectory Generator Service**, **Simulation Service**, **Continuous Validation Service**). Network topology is not explicitly detailed, but the architecture suggests a star topology with the database as the core and services communicating via the broker. Bandwidth and latency requirements are not quantified, but real-time validation implies low-latency communication (likely <100ms for trajectory comparisons). Reliability and redundancy mechanisms are not described, though the **Continuous Validation Service**’s threshold-based alerts suggest fault detection. Security protocols are not specified, but the use of a dedicated **MQTT Broker** and centralized database implies controlled access (e.g., authentication for services)."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The **Digital Twin** is deployed on an unspecified infrastructure, but the architecture suggests a hybrid model: the **Physical Crane Interface**, **Control Application**, and **Logging Application** likely run on-premise (co-located with the crane hardware), while the **Digital Twin** services (e.g., **Trajectory Generator**, **Simulation Service**, **Dashboard**) may operate on edge or cloud platforms for scalability. Computational requirements are not detailed, but the **Simulation Service** and **Continuous Validation Service** imply moderate CPU/GPU needs for real-time trajectory processing. Storage requirements are met by **TimescaleDB**, optimized for time-series data. Scalability mechanisms are not described, but the modular container-based design (per C4 Model) suggests horizontal scaling for services like the **MQTT Broker** or **Dashboard**. Deployment models are not explicitly stated, but the use of Python applications and a database implies containerization (e.g., Docker) or virtualization. Availability/reliability assurance is not addressed, though the validation service’s alerting implies monitoring."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin systems demonstrate **limited horizontal integration** with external systems. The **GreenhouseDT** relies on **InfluxDB** (open-source) and **ActiveMQ** (standardized messaging) for data exchange but does not specify interoperability with enterprise systems. The **Air Quality Management** exemplar uses **AutomationML** (industry-standard for engineering data) and **Microsoft Azure** (cloud-based tools), enabling **protocol-agnostic integration** with external IoT/sensor networks but lacks explicit details on enterprise system dependencies. The **gantry crane** system (logistics domain) does not document external integrations, though its **cyber-physical** nature suggests potential for **OPC UA** or **MQTT**-based interoperability with port logistics systems. No standardized APIs or Digital Twin frameworks (e.g., Siemens MindSphere, PTC ThingWorx) are employed."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Air Quality Management exemplar adheres to:
  - **AutomationML** for digital twin modeling and interoperability.
  - **Microsoft Azure tools** (likely compliant with **ISO/IEC 25010** for cloud-based systems, though not explicitly stated).
  The GreenhouseDT exemplar uses:
  - **InfluxDB** (time-series database standard: **InfluxData’s line protocol**).
  - **ActiveMQ** (JMS/AMQP-compliant message broker).
  The gantry crane exemplar lacks explicit standardization details but employs the **C4 Model** (a software architecture modeling standard). **No certification requirements or compliance frameworks** (e.g., IEC 62443 for cyber-physical systems) are mentioned. Interoperability is implied via **containerization/virtualization** and **GitHub dissemination**, but no formal standards (e.g., OPC UA, FIWARE) are referenced."
]
